      <script>
  (function(){
    try{
      var scope = document.querySelector('#contact-area') || document;

      function isVisible(el){
        if(!el) return false;
        var cs = getComputedStyle(el);
        if (cs.display === 'none' || cs.visibility === 'hidden' || cs.opacity === '0') return false;
        if (!el.offsetParent && cs.position !== 'fixed') return false;
        return true;
      }

      function decideStep(){
        // 1) サンクス表示が“見えている”時だけ complete（最優先）
        var thanks = scope.querySelector('.mw_wp_form_complete, .form-complete, .thanks, #thanks-message');
        if (isVisible(thanks)) {
          document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-form-step', 'complete');
          return;
        }

        // 2) 確認レイアウト（readonly/確認用ラッパ）が見えている → confirm
        var confirmLayout = scope.querySelector('.mw_wp_form_confirm, .form-confirm, .confirm-table, [readonly]');
        if (isVisible(confirmLayout)) {
          document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-form-step', 'confirm');
          return;
        }

        // 3) 送信ボタンが見えている（サンクス無し） → confirm（送信直前）
        var btnComplete = scope.querySelector('button.smf-button-control__control[data-action="complete"]');
        if (isVisible(btnComplete)) {
          document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-form-step', 'confirm');
          return;
        }

        // 4) それ以外 → input
        document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-form-step', 'input');
      }

      // 初回判定
      decideStep();

      // SPA/AJAX等のDOM変化にも追従（不要なら削除可）
      new MutationObserver(decideStep).observe(scope, {
        subtree:true, childList:true, attributes:true,
        attributeFilter:['style','class','hidden','aria-hidden','disabled']
      });
    }catch(e){/* no-op */}
  })();
  </script>

<script id="cloudflare-turnstile-js-before">
function onloadTurnstileCallback() {
				const forms = document.querySelectorAll( ".snow-monkey-form" );
					[].slice.call( forms ).forEach( ( form ) => {
						const container = form.querySelector( ".snow-monkey-forms-turnstile" );
						const tokenField = form.querySelector( "input[name=\"cf-turnstile-response\"]" );
						const toggleSubmittersDisabled = ( disabled ) => {
							const actionArea = form.querySelector( ".smf-action" );
							if ( ! actionArea ) {
								return;
							}

							const submitters = actionArea.querySelectorAll( '[type="submit"]' );
							submitters.forEach( ( submitter ) => {
								if ( disabled ) {
									submitter.setAttribute( "disabled", "disabled" );
								} else {
									submitter.removeAttribute( "disabled" );
								}
							} );
						};

					if ( ! container || ! tokenField ) {
						return;
					}

						const turnstileWidgetId = turnstile.render( container, {
							sitekey: "0x4AAAAAAC2JQzKSPtUnTDwH",
							theme: "auto",
							size: "normal",
							callback: function() {
								toggleSubmittersDisabled( false );
							},
						} );

						form.addEventListener( "smf.input", () => {
							toggleSubmittersDisabled( true );
						} );
						form.addEventListener( "smf.submit", () => {
							toggleSubmittersDisabled( true );
							turnstile.reset( turnstileWidgetId );
						} );
					form.addEventListener( "smf.systemerror", () => {
						turnstile.reset( turnstileWidgetId );
					} );
				} );
			}
//# sourceURL=cloudflare-turnstile-js-before
</script>

  <script>
(function(){
  var ROOT = document.documentElement;

  // 状態の優先度（ダウングレード禁止）
  var rank = { input:0, confirm:1, complete:2, error:3 };

  function setStep(next){
    if (!next) return;
    var cur = ROOT.getAttribute('data-form-step');
    if (!cur || (rank[next] > (rank[cur] ?? -1))) {
      ROOT.setAttribute('data-form-step', next);
    }
  }

  function stepFromScreen(scr){
    if (scr === 'complete')     return 'complete';
    if (scr === 'systemerror')  return 'error';
    if (scr === 'confirm' || scr === 'back') return 'confirm';
    return 'input';
  }

  function attach(scope){
    var form = scope.querySelector('form.snow-monkey-form');
    if (!form) return;

    // 初期反映
    setStep(stepFromScreen(form.getAttribute('data-screen') || ''));

    // data-screen の変化を監視
    new MutationObserver(function(muts){
      for (var i=0; i<muts.length; i++){
        if (muts[i].type === 'attributes') {
          setStep(stepFromScreen(form.getAttribute('data-screen') || ''));
        }
      }
    }).observe(form, { attributes:true, attributeFilter:['data-screen'] });

    // フォーム自体が差し替わるケースに追従（AJAX/SPA）
    var reattach = new MutationObserver(function(){
      var f = scope.querySelector('form.snow-monkey-form');
      if (f && f !== form) {
        this.disconnect(); // いったん切って付け直し
        attach(scope);
      }
    });
    reattach.observe(scope, { childList:true, subtree:true });
  }

  function boot(){
    // まずは既存の想定スコープ
    var scope = document.querySelector('#contact-area') || document;
    attach(scope);

    // 英語ページ等で form が別ラッパに入っている場合のフォールバック
    setTimeout(function(){
      if (!ROOT.hasAttribute('data-form-step')) {
        var near = (document.querySelector('form.snow-monkey-form') || document)
                    .closest('#contact-area, main, .l-contents, .container') || document;
        attach(near);
      }
    }, 0);
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);
  window.addEventListener('pageshow', boot);
})();
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const form = document.querySelector('form.snow-monkey-form');
  if (!form) return;

  const names = ['phone_number1','phone_number2','phone_number3'];
  const getInput = n => form.querySelector(`[name="${n}"]`);
  const a = getInput('phone_number1'), b = getInput('phone_number2'), c = getInput('phone_number3');
  if (!a || !b || !c) return;

  // phone_number1 直下に自前エラー行を1つだけ用意
  let customErr = form.querySelector('#phones-error');
  if (!customErr) {
    customErr = document.createElement('p');
    customErr.id = 'phones-error';
    customErr.className = 'smf-error';
    customErr.setAttribute('aria-live', 'polite');
    a.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', customErr);
  }

  const allFilled = () => names.every(n => (getInput(n)?.value || '').trim() !== '');

  const render = () => {
    if (allFilled()) {
      customErr.textContent = '';
      customErr.style.display = 'none';
    } else {
      customErr.textContent = '電話番号が入力されていません。';
      customErr.style.display = '';
    }
  };

  // 入力のたびに判定
  [a,b,c].forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('input', render, { capture: true });
    el.addEventListener('change', render, { capture: true });
  });

  // 送信時、全部埋まってなければ送信を止めて1の下にだけエラーを表示
  form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
    if (!allFilled()) {
      e.preventDefault();
      customErr.textContent = '電話番号が入力されていません。';
      customErr.style.display = '';
      a.focus({ preventScroll: false });
      // スクロールが必要なら↓を有効化
      // customErr.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
    }
  }, { capture: true });

  // 初期反映（要件どおり：全部埋まるまで 1 の下だけに表示）
  render();
});
</script>
</form>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const tocList = document.querySelector('#toc_container .toc_list');
  if (!tocList) return;

  // ① 本文の見出しを収集（必要な階層だけ）
  const headings = document.querySelectorAll('.entry-content h2, .entry-content h3');

  if (headings.length === 0) return;

  // ② liが空 or aが無い場合は作り直す
  tocList.innerHTML = '';

  const slugify = (s) => s.normalize('NFKD')
    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
    .trim()
    .replace(/\s+/g, '-')
    .toLowerCase();

  headings.forEach((h, i) => {
    // aria-hidden等で空取りこぼしを避けつつ、純テキストを抽出
    const text = Array.from(h.childNodes).map(n => {
      if (n.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) return n.nodeValue || '';
      if (n.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
        const el = n;
        if (el.getAttribute && el.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') return '';
        return el.textContent || '';
      }
      return '';
    }).join(' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();

    if (!text) return; // 本当に空ならスキップ

    // ③ アンカーIDが無ければ付与
    if (!h.id) {
      let base = slugify(text) || ('sec-' + (i+1));
      let id = base, n = 2;
      while (document.getElementById(id)) id = base + '-' + n++;
      h.id = id;
    }

    // ④ TOC項目を生成
    const li = document.createElement('li');
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = '#' + encodeURIComponent(h.id);
    a.textContent = text;
    li.appendChild(a);
    tocList.appendChild(li);
  });
});
</script>
